results.title: West End development would bring 68 multifamily units near Westgate shopping center
results.description: Seven parcels at Westgate North Shopping Center sold last month for $37 million.

results.title: New Michigan brewery and restaurant sits on 500 acres with bison, a lake, and an unforgettable family story
results.description: The venture includes a taproom, restaurant, retail store where beer made on site will be sold, as well as event space for gatherings and live music, and outdoor recreation area to enjoy.
